notes:
Seti Astro Suite Pro

V1.18.9
Update Axiom3 and for Mask Creation Preview, Low RAM mode in Stacking Suite, RC Astro updates, runtime torch updates for hybrid systems.

V1.18.8 
 Maintenance update for UX and Bugs in: Plate Solver, Stacking Suite, RCAstro, Satellite Remover, WIMI

V1.18.7
 New Crop Feature: Image Overlay. Overlay multiple image (and use option colorize) to see exactly the crop box you want to use to batch crop all the images at one.
 Fly Through: Major updates to include a Mid Layer for a more layered fly through affect. 
 Other updates to 3D Planet Projection, Plate Solvers, Syqon Starless for Axiom V3 support, and RC Astro tools.
